Description: Coalesced Mana tier line — custom WCIDs 850366-850368. Clones from 24835; MirrorEmoteFromWcid 24835 for Collector Give emotes. Blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays 1-3.

Weenies.Notes: Lesser tier. Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' top-right black (100690976).

PropertiesString.Name: Coalesced Mana (Lesser)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: A faintly shimmering crystal of condensed mana. Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these crystals to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Greater tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' top-right black (100690977).

PropertiesString.Name: Coalesced Mana (Greater)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: A brightly shimmering crystal of condensed mana. Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these crystals to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.

Weenies.Notes: Aetheric tier. Magical (1) glow. Overlay '3' top-right black (100690978).

PropertiesString.Name: Coalesced Mana (Aetheric)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: A brilliantly shimmering crystal of pure condensed mana. Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these crystals to Collector Vaetha in the Town Network.
